description: Update .agents/state/ files to reflect the completion of Phase 2 and Phase 3. Update quant-autonomous-status.json with passing gates, quant-launch-gates.md with new status, and quant-phase-log.md with phase completion evidence.
steps: Step 1: Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json - set current_phase to 'phase-3', update all gates to their current pass/fail status (lint should now be pass, audit_high should now be pass), add phase-0, phase-1, phase-2, phase-3 to completed_phases, update last_updated to current ISO timestamp, and update critical_risks to remove resolved items.

Step 2: Update .agents/state/quant-launch-gates.md - update the table to show current status of all gates. Update the narrative sections to reflect that lint is now functional and audit is now passing. Update Phase Progression section.
Step 3: Append to .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md - add Phase 2 and Phase 3 completion entries with what changed, commands run with pass/fail results, remaining blockers, and next actions.
acceptance_criteria: quant-phase-log.md has Phase 2 and Phase 3 entries with command evidence
verification: Read .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json and confirm gates match reality
Read .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md and confirm Phase 2/3 entries exist
